# MinerU Production Guide
> Production deployment guide for self-hosting MinerU — Docker, Ray clusters, GPU tuning, error troubleshooting.

## Core pages
Page: https://mineru.dev/
Page: https://mineru.dev/production-guide/

## Chapter previews
Page: https://mineru.dev/chapters/architecture/ — Pipeline decision tree, CPU vs GPU, vLLM vs sglang backend selection
Page: https://mineru.dev/chapters/docker-setup/ — Multi-stage Dockerfile, docker-compose, model caching
Page: https://mineru.dev/chapters/multi-node/ — Ray cluster setup, shared storage, queue management
Page: https://mineru.dev/chapters/performance/ — Batch size tuning, GPU memory profiling, worker scaling
Page: https://mineru.dev/chapters/troubleshooting/ — Error reference table, protobuf compat patch, debugging checklist
Page: https://mineru.dev/chapters/comparison/ — MinerU vs Docling vs Marker benchmarks, decision matrix, migration guides

Page: https://mineru.dev/privacy/
Page: https://mineru.dev/terms/
